---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new board
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or board you'd like supported.

**Why?**
The problem it solves or the use case.

**Hardware (if proposing a new board)**
- Chip: (e.g. ESP32-S3, ESP32-P4)
- Vendor / model:
- Display + touch controller:
